summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of BlueMind AI React application. All core features working correctly with excellent user experience.

minor_issues.issue: Console warning about missing Description or aria-describedby for accessibility
Dialog overlay occasionally intercepts pointer events requiring force clicks
minor_issues.workaround: Use Escape key or force clicks

passed_tests: Chat page loads with initial AI message
Chat input accepts text and send button functionality
User messages display with purple gradient bubbles
AI responses with typing indicator simulation (1.5s delay)
Sidebar navigation with icon-only design and tooltips
Navigation between Chat, Reminders, and Feedback pages
Reminders page stats cards (Total, Active, Completed, Overdue)
Reminder cards with priority badges and due dates
Add Reminder dialog with form validation
Reminder creation with title, description, date picker, priority
Toggle reminder completion checkbox
Delete reminder functionality
Feedback page star rating interaction (1-5 stars)
Feedback type selection (Suggestion, Bug Report, Praise)
Feedback form submission with toast notification
Form validation (disabled buttons when required fields empty)
Page transitions with framer-motion animations
Responsive design elements
Blue/Purple gradient dark mode theme
Modern card-based layout with proper spacing
